title: fragaria viridis subsp. campestris
intro: Fragaria viridis subsp. campestris, also known as wild strawberry or beach strawberry, is a subspecies of the Fragaria viridis species, which is a type of wild strawberry native to coastal areas and sandy dunes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. Fragaria viridis subsp. campestris has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
